description_long: This is a classic adult tricycle with a sturdy metal frame painted in a muted green color. It features two large rear wheels and a single front wheel, all equipped with thin metal spokes and fitted with fenders for protection against splashes. The tricycle has a single brown saddle seat and a pair of wide, curved handlebars with brown grips, providing a comfortable and upright riding posture. The pedals are centrally located and connected to a visible chain drive system. There is no rear cargo basket or storage compartment, giving the tricycle a streamlined appearance. The overall design is practical for urban commuting or leisurely rides in parks and neighborhoods.
description: A green adult tricycle with two large rear wheels, a single front wheel, curved handlebars, and a brown saddle seat. It has a classic, streamlined design without a rear cargo basket.
description_view_0: Three-quarter front view showing the curved handlebars, brown saddle seat, and all three wheels with fenders.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the single front wheel, wide handlebars, and the alignment of the frame.
description_view_2: Three-quarter rear view displaying the two large rear wheels, fenders, and the absence of a rear cargo basket.
description_view_3: Direct rear view focusing on the two rear wheels, fenders, and the back of the saddle seat.
